name: Mochi
story: Mochi came to us at three weeks old, bottle-fed by her foster after being found under a porch in East Van. She has repaid every feeding with double the purrs.
She is the kitten who greets you at the door, supervises your cooking, and falls asleep mid-pounce. Mochi would love a home with people around often — or a feline friend to keep her busy.

medical.notes: First and second FVRCP done. Clean bill of health at her spay check-up.

photoAlt: Mochi, a warm brown tabby kitten, eyes closed and smiling in a sunbeam
